title: Fast Config API
description: This API makes creating Configs easy and fast
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jhHNjn7K/images/38685788e23cc9ba5911e5bf593533254fca1d2d.png) ### **A lightweight API to manage your Configs easily.**
Check out the ["Getting started"](https://github.com/Infinituum17/FastConfigAPI/wiki/Getting-Started) page to get started immediately. ## How it works This mod makes easy *loading*, _managing_ and _deleting_ your configs at runtime.
The whole purpose of this mod is to have a simple and easy-to-follow api, so you can start creating your configs as fast as possible and also make them platform-independent, so that you can use it with all the mod loaders you like. Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/Infinituum17/FastConfigAPI/wiki/Getting-Started) to get started. ## Additional resources This mod uses [Void Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/void-lib), so if you're using [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), and you're interested in integrating some advanced functionalities using annotations in your mod, you should check it out.
